items.name: dateMe
items.description: dateMe is a playful, mobile-friendly web form—“SO YOU WAN DATE ME?”—in Nigerian Pidgin. Suitors answer relationship-style questions (kids, pets, jealousy, silly prompts); the UI reacts with humour and cheeky validation. It’s plain HTML/CSS/JS, easy to fork, and optionally saves submissions to a Google Sheet via Apps Script—no backend required.
